name: codex-dynamic-workflows-lab
description: Experimental Codex plugin for bounded local dynamic workflow orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Run bounded local Codex workflow jobs
interface.longDescription: Package a skill and local stdio MCP server for validating, submitting, tracking, and reading bounded Codex-compatible dynamic workflow runs. The plugin is experimental and defaults to read-only workflow policy.
defaultPrompt: Use bounded dynamic workflows to run a read-only parallel repository review
